name: Hiding Files with Attrib
notes:
This rule detects usage of attrib.exe to hide files from users.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Sami Ruohonen
SIGMA Title: Hiding Files with Attrib.exe
SIGMA Description: Detects usage of attrib.exe to hide files from users.


Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches LOWER("Process Full Full Name") == 'attrib.exe' AQL filter query
when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '% +h %' AQL filter query

when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\desktop.ini %' OR (LOWER("Parent Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%cmd.exe' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '+R +H +S +A \\%.cui' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE 'C:\\WINDOWS\\system32\\%.bat') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Hiding Files with Attrib on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches LOWER("Process Full Full Name") == 'attrib.exe' AQL filter query
AND when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '% +h %' AQL filter query

AND NOT when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\desktop.ini %' OR (LOWER("Parent Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%cmd.exe' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '+R +H +S +A \\%.cui' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE 'C:\\WINDOWS\\system32\\%.bat') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Hiding Files with Attrib.exe
Event description: Detects usage of attrib.exe to hide files from users.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
